parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ score: $json.score, grade: $json.grade, breakdown: $json.breakdown, review_count: $json.review_count, review_rating: $json.review_rating, post_count_30d: $json.post_count_30d }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ (() => { const d = $('Calculate Score').first().json; const b = d.breakdown; let msg = `🏢 *GBP Optimization Score — ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}*

`; msg += `Score: *${d.score}/100* (Grade: *${d.grade}*)

`; msg += `*Breakdown:*
`; msg += `• Posts (30d): ${b.posts}/25 pts (${d.post_count_30d} posts)
`; msg += `• Reviews: ${b.reviews}/20 pts (${d.review_count} total)
`; msg += `• Rating: ${b.rating}/15 pts (${d.review_rating}⭐)
`; msg += `• Photos: ${b.photos}/15 pts (${d.photo_count} photos)
`; msg += `• FAQ Freshness: ${b.faq_freshness}/15 pts
`; msg += `• Hours: ${b.hours}/10 pts
`; if (d.recommendations.length > 0) { msg += `
*Recommendations:*
`; d.recommendations.forEach(r => { msg += `➡️ ${r}
`; }); } return msg; })() }}
